name: Eagle Bancorp Montana, Inc.
business: Eagle Bancorp Montana provides loan and deposit services to small businesses and individuals in Montana, focusing on residential mortgages, commercial real estate, commercial business, agricultural, and home equity loans.

exposures.sentence: We are a diversified lender with a focus on residential mortgage loans, commercial real estate mortgage loans, commercial business loans, agricultural loans and second mortgage/home equity loan products.
The Bank originates residential 1-4 family mortgage loans secured by property located in the Bank’s market areas.
The Bank also lends funds for commercial construction and development.
